source.title: Temu Trustpilot Reviews and Rating Data (2025-2026)

extractions.claim: Temu Trustpilot rating is 2.0/5.0 with ~49,000 total reviews (March 2026)
extractions.evidence: Temu holds an average rating of 2.5 out of 5 stars on Trustpilot. Nearly 48,878 people have already contributed reviews. Multiple sources cite the rating at 2.0-2.5 range.

verification.verifier_notes: Cross-referenced with Trustindex, Sitejabber (2 stars/1,760 reviews), BBB (2.29/5 from 1,805 reviews), and hellopeter (2.8 TrustIndex).

extractions.claim: Temu Trustpilot rating distribution is heavily polarized: ~34% 5-star, majority 1-star. Regional profiles show 47-64% 1-star reviews.
extractions.evidence: Around 34% of users have rated Temu five stars. Regional temu.fi profile: 5-star 27%, 1-star 47%. temu.eu profile: 5-star 14%, 1-star 64%.

verification.verifier_notes: Regional profiles are smaller samples (50-59 reviews) but directionally consistent with overall pattern.

extractions.claim: 10.9% of Temu reviews on Trustpilot in 2025 are likely AI-generated, up from 0.75% in 2022 (1,361% increase)
extractions.evidence: The rate of likely AI reviews about Temu on Trustpilot has increased by 1,361% from 2022 to 2025. In 2022 probable AI reviews were 0.75%. By 2025, likely AI reviews reached 10.90%.

extractions.claim: Top Temu complaint themes: misleading promotions, rising prices, poor customer service (bots), product quality mismatch, inconsistent sizing
extractions.evidence: Common complaints: misleading 'free gift for new customers' promotions, prices creeping up to where other sites are cheaper, customer service bots are unhelpful, items frequently don't match images/descriptions, sizes wrong.

verification.verifier_notes: Aggregated from multiple Trustpilot review analysis sources (2025-2026)
